column1: # grep-tells.tsv — TIER 1 (flat-presence) rules for audit-swiftui-app-file-handling (doc-01 … doc-13).
# severity: hard | warn | adv   (hard → runner exits 2). The runner greps each ERE over the target *.swift.
# This LOCATES only — the LLM agent READS each hit (SKILL.md step 3) and decides. Structural rules that
# grep cannot express (missing-snapshot containment, MainActor-on-document) live in ast-grep/*.yml (tier 2).

column4: @FocusedDocument is NOT a real symbol → custom FocusedValues @Entry key + @FocusedValue(\.focusedDocument)
a CLASS conforms to value-type FileDocument → use ReferenceFileDocument (reference semantics + snapshot)
UIDocument / raw UIDocumentPickerViewController in a SwiftUI app → use DocumentGroup + FileDocument/ReferenceFileDocument, or the .fileImporter sheet (cross_ref uikit-interop)
DocumentGroupLaunchScene is iOS 18.0+ — above the iOS 17 project floor: gate with @available(iOS 18, *) / if #available, do not remove (cross_ref app-lifecycle-background)
custom UTType — VERIFY it is declared in Info.plist (UTExportedTypeDeclarations / UTImportedTypeDeclarations) or the type is unrecognized
readableContentTypes present — if the document is editable, writableContentTypes MUST also be set or it is read-only by accident (doc-07)
FileWrapper.regularFileContents read — guard against nil (force-unwrap = crash/data loss on a directory or empty wrapper) (doc-09)
mutating configuration.document directly bypasses the $document BINDING → no dirty-state/autosave; READ to confirm (doc-10, locator only)
manual file IO in a document app — prefer the document type's read/write or the .fileImporter/.fileExporter sheet; if the URL is security-scoped, cross_ref document-picker-permissions (doc-11)
ReferenceFileDocument present — locator for doc-03 (needs func snapshot(contentType:)) and doc-12 (wire @Environment(\.undoManager) for undo)

.fileImporter present — allowedContentTypes: is REQUIRED; without it the picker is empty/locked (doc-13). READ the call; also consume the returned security-scoped URL (cross_ref document-picker-permissions)
